caption: Engaged-soldier highlight (Settings.show_engaged_highlight, HUD Menu -> Engaged-soldier highlight): tints a unit's soldiers amber when they're in Unit.engaged_soldier_indices()'s returned set. A Schiltron is pressed by two cavalry from ONLY ONE side -- watch the amber highlight concentrate on the pressed front, not ring the WHOLE perimeter the way #758's same-unit centroid-distance selection would regardless of where the real attackers are. That's the difference this PR's cross-unit proximity check makes for #752's remaining gap.
